messages.title: NoworytaPhotography
messages.description: Website for Interior Photographer Katarzyna Noworyta
messages.author: @dnoworyta
messages.HEROSECTION.heroSliderSubheading: I love to see what other`s do with their living places and I want to show this in a best possible way.
messages.ABOUTSECTION.longdesc: I would like to tell you about my passion. I'm interior photographer. I'm doing this because every interior is unique in its own way and worth photographing. I would like to show you how to tell your interior story by using my camera. In my work I'm trying to pay attention to every detail, because
messages.ABOUTSECTION.devil: the devil is in the detail
messages.CONTACTSECTION.ContactMsg: If you wanna contact me feel free to use the contact form below or write directly on my email:
messages.CONTACTSECTION.Name: Name
messages.PRIVACYPOLICY.PrivacyPolicyDetail: This privacy and cookie policy describes the rules for handling data personal data and the use of cookies and other technologies within the website https://noworytaphotography.com The website administrator is Katarzyna Noworyta, based in Cologne 50-996, Grungurtelstr. 10. Contact with the administrator is possible at the e-mail address contact@noworytaphotography.com
messages.PRIVACYPOLICY.DefinitionDetail: 1.For the purposes of this privacy policy, the following meaning concepts are adopted: a) Administrator - Katarzyna Noworyta, based in Cologne 50-996, Grungurtelstr. 10. b) Website - website available at https://noworytaphotography.com c) User - any entity that uses the Website.
messages.PRIVACYPOLICY.PersonalDataDetail: 1. The User may provide his personal data to the Administrator using the forms available on the Website, such as the newsletter. 2. The administrator of the User's personal data is the Administrator. 3. The data provided to the Administrator as part of the newsletter form are processed for the purpose information about new products, promotions and products from Noworytaphotography 4. The administrator guarantees the confidentiality of all personal data provided to him. 5. Providing data is always voluntary, but necessary for the User to take action, for which the given form is intended. 6. The administrator does not disclose the data provided to him to any third parties. 7. Personal data is collected with due diligence and properly protected against access to them by unauthorized persons. 8. The User has the following rights: a) the right to request access to personal data concerning the data subject, rectification, deletion or processing restrictions, b) the right to object to the processing, c) the right to transfer data, d) the right to withdraw consent to the processing of personal data in specific purpose, if the User previously gave such consent, e) the right to lodge a complaint to the supervisory body in connection with the processing of personal data by the Administrator
messages.PRIVACYPOLICY.CookiesDetails: 1. The administrator uses cookies (cookies), i.e. small text information, stored on the User's end device (e.g. computer, tablet, smartphone). Cookies can be read by the Administrator's IT system. 2. The administrator stores cookies on the User's end device, and then accesses the information contained therein for statistical purposes, for purposes marketing (remarketing, recovery of abandoned carts) and to ensure proper operation of the Website. 3. The Administrator informs the User that there is a possibility of such configuration a web browser that prevents the storage of cookies on the device end user. In such a situation, the use of the Website by the User may be difficult. 4. The administrator hereby indicates that cookies may be deleted by the User after they are saved by the Administrator through the appropriate functions of the web browser, programs for this purpose or the use of appropriate tools available under the operating system used by the User.
messages.PRIVACYPOLICY.ServerLogsDetails: 1. Using the Website involves sending queries to the server on whichthe page is stored. 2. Each query addressed to the server is saved in the server logs. Logs include among others User's IP address, server date and time, information about the web browser and the operating system used by the User. 3. Logs are saved and stored on the server. 4. The data saved in the server logs are not associated with specific users The pages and are not used by the Administrator to identify the User. 5. The server logs are only auxiliary material used to administer the Website, a their content is not disclosed to anyone except those authorized to administer server.
messages.PRIVACYPOLICY.InformationUpdateDetails: 1. Please inform us if there is a need to correct or update your data personal data that we hold
messages.notfound.description: You just hit a route that doesn't exist... the sadness.
